message:
fix(stdio_synth): allow 'l' length modifier for floating-point specifiers

POSIX specifies that 'l' with floating-point conversions (f/e/g/a) "has no
effect" but is not invalid. glibc accepts %lf. The length_mask was 0x80
(only L), now 0x84 (L and l) to match POSIX semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
